PlaceToVisit.title: Kuala Lumpur Bird Park
PlaceToVisit.description: One of the world's largest free-flight aviaries, housing thousands of birds in a lush rainforest setting.
PlaceToVisit.details: Walk-in aviary with over 300 species, Daily feeding sessions at 10:30 AM and 3:30 PM, Educational shows and bird encounters

Foods.title: Nasi Kandar Beratur
Foods.description: A legendary late-night spot famous for its flavourful rice drenched in various curries and side dishes.

gettingAround.title: Public Transport
gettingAround.description: Use buses, MRT, and taxis for convenient travel across the city.
